Class: ALL
Race: ALL
White Hellebore

This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 8 gp 2 sp 5 cp
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 02:08:53
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Average Price: 13pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 15

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

South Karana
NPC Name
a hiding gnoll
a Ishva Lteth gnoll
a Nisch Mas Gnoll
a Rosch Val Gnoll
a Tesch Mas Gnoll

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Northern Felwithe
Quest Name

Recipe list - Premium only.

I farm this for shammy alchemy ingrediant

dorps
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2007 at 9:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592310106944
5 posts
ive farmed 20-30 Tesch Mas Gnolls and got 10 white hellebores today
▲ Page top
Common?
QuoteReply
# Jun 18 2006 at 10:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591872415299
14 posts
I've been using my druid to snare about 20 - 30 gnolls at a time and then upheaval them. Pretty easy killing, but I've killed around 200 now, and only have 13 White Hellbore. Is this normal, or have I just happened upon a slow day for drops? I have, however, made a fortune selling the weapons these guys drop, so it's not all a wash. But at this rate I dont think I'll be skilling up my rogue using this item. ~_~
▲ Page top
Distillate of Clarity IV
QuoteReply
# May 03 2006 at 3:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1638146086217
23 posts
Also used in Alchemy for Distillate of Clarity IV.

1 White Hellebore
1 Snake Head Iris
1 Katuka Bark
5 Small Vial

Makes 5 if you succeed, triv of 88

MAGIC ITEM
EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
Potion Belt Enabled
Effect: Elixir of Clarity IV (Casting Time: 1.5)
Required level of 20.
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Elixir of Clarity IV
Required Level: 20
Spell Effect: Restores 4 mana every 6 seconds for up to 30:00.

(Not sure why the level req is on there twice tho)

mixed up
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2003 at 4:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759618801
10 posts
You have to make sure that you have the correct one you need there are 2 different kinds the Hellebore and the Hellbore..The Hellebore is found in Paw and is dropable.Not sure about the other though sry..
▲ Page top
this is the quest item and is not nodrop
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2002 at 4:16 PM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
126 posts
the item for the quest.... is not nodrop. it is a normal herb and can be traded. the other items are nodrop though.
▲ Page top
Drop or No Drop
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2002 at 10:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779626708
View User Forum
9 posts
Ok, I think I just answered my own question. I believe that the white hellebore you can drop. The pouch of the red dust and the thick caustic flued are no drops. Please correct me if this is wrong.
▲ Page top
No Drop or Drop
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2002 at 10:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779626708
View User Forum
9 posts
I'm totally confused about this. Is this item a no drop or can it be dropped? I have two of these that I got in Split Paw they they can be dropped and the spoiler that I have plainly says the items are no drop. Anyone know for sure?
▲ Page top
Not no drop
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2002 at 7:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777250173
View User Forum
7 posts
Tis not a no drop item, someone from my guild got it in Splitpaw and gave to me know ing i was doing this quest. Hope this helps
▲ Page top
no drop?? I don't think so
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2001 at 12:11 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591753197800
Scholar
240 posts
The quest description for the Tunare Warden says the White hellebore is no drop. This is not correct unless there is another type of white hellebore. A player in Paw gave me this in a trade. Just wanted to let ya know :)
▲ Page top
RE: no drop?? I don't think so
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 10:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765487459
31 posts
I came to this page with that same question (no drop??). I found some at the gypsie camp in NK. I'm guessing that it's not no drop and that someone after hunting in paw sold there. I'd hate to do the whole quest and find out later that it's a different type though :(
